history.content:
<thought>
The agent is facing north at (7,D). Directly ahead is lava at (6,D). The goal is at (5,F), two rows ahead and two columns to the right. The only safe adjacent cell is east at (7,E) which is floor. To move east, I need to turn right to face east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at row05 column B. My current position is row07 column D facing up. The cell directly in front of me (north) is a floor cell at row06 col D. Moving forward will get me closer to the goal. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north (^). The cell directly ahead (row06, column D) is a floor ('.'), so safe to move. The goal is at row06, column B, two cells west from the current location. Moving forward will bring me one step closer and allow me to then turn left to head west toward the goal. No immediate danger.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (07, D) facing north. The goal G is at (07, B), two cells to the west. The cell directly forward (06, D) is a wall (#). To move towards the goal, I need to face west. Turning left from north will face west.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north, and the cell directly in front of me (D6) is floor. The goal is at D5, two cells ahead. I will move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>The goal is directly in front of me at cell D06. I can reach it by moving forward.</thought>
<action>MOVE_FORWARD</action>
